title: The Ball Trial Overwhelms the Crew
description: Satori uses mantra and surprise traps to overwhelm Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp inside the Ordeal of Balls.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Satori, Luffy, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall. Satori uses mantra and surprise traps to overwhelm Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp inside the Ordeal of Balls.

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Too much traumatic experiences... Heart... can't withstand....!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't have any more tricks, do you!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ........when that happens, you're completely doomed!! Huhuhuhuhuhuhuhuhuhuhuhuhuhu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: You will wander around in this forest...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh-huhuhuhuh!!!! Which one is the fire order?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'll leave it to you, Luffy!!

summary: Satori uses mantra and surprise traps to overwhelm Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp inside the Ordeal of Balls.
